primary_prize: First Place open innovation track for Real-World ZK on Stellar

primary_sponsor.name: Stellar Development Foundation
primary_sponsor.primitive: Stellar/Soroban transaction or contract state tied to ZK verification
primary_sponsor.score_reason: The hero outcome must become an inspectable Stellar result. Removing Stellar turns the product into a local proof demo and fails the event requirement.

core_user_action: submit a private-condition claim, bid, score, or voucher and sign the result path
visible_outcome: a public payout, access pass, score, settlement, or receipt changes state
proof_surface: success screen, Stellar tx/contract state, proof command, README evidence
removal_breaks: public ownership, settlement, and judge inspection of the result

non_primary_sponsors.name: Circom / Noir / RISC Zero
non_primary_sponsors.why_not_primary: The event rewards ZK on Stellar, not a proof-system brand story.

judge_sentence: Stellar/Soroban result -> private-condition action -> public payout/access/receipt
